collection.title: Collection
collection.lockedMessage: Upgrade to Premium, add a slot, or free one up by deleting it.
collection.deleteConfirmMessage: %{brand} %{model} will be removed from your collection. This action is permanent.
collection.teaserSubtitle: Value, capital gains and trends of your collection.
collection.errorSubtitle:
Your collection is safe,
but we can't load it right now.
collection.emptySubtitle:
Take a photo of your first watch,
we'll identify it for you.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.photoPermissionMessage: Allow access to your photos in Settings.
wishlist.notRecognizedMessage: The photo is attached — search for the model or enter it manually.
wishlist.lockedMessage: Upgrade to Premium, add a slot, or free one up by removing it.
wishlist.photoAttached: Photo attached — it will illustrate this watch.
wishlist.emptySubtitle:
Track the market value of the watches you covet,
with or without a photo.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: The next chapter of Watchy: connecting collectors.

communities.title: Communities created by members
communities.text: Buying & selling, brand discussions, advice — collectors are in charge, not us.

threads.title: Discussion threads
threads.text: Post, comment and chat about your watches, just like on your favorite forums.

privacy.title: Public or private profile — you decide
privacy.text: Show off your collection showcase… or stay discreet. Private by default.

community.premiumStrip: Premium members will be able to create their own communities.
community.notified: We'll let you know as soon as it opens.

auth.forgotNeedEmail: Enter your email address above first.
auth.resetEmailSentMessage: If an account exists for this address, you will receive a link to choose a new password. Open it from this device.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

paywall.title: Watchy Premium
paywall.subtitle: From inventory to wealth management.

features.unlimited: Unlimited collection and wishlist — 3 + 3 on the free plan
features.weekly: Market value updated weekly — monthly on the free plan
features.alerts: Alerts when your watches move in value

paywall.legalPrefix: 7-day free trial, then %{monthly}/month or %{annual}/year depending on the plan. Renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the period — manage or cancel in Settings › Subscriptions. By subscribing, you accept our
paywall.stubTitle: Watchy is free during the beta
paywall.stubMessage: Enjoy every feature — subscriptions will come later.
paywall.restoreStub: No purchases to restore during the beta.
paywall.restoreNone: No active subscription found for this account.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Take a photo, AI identifies it, you track its value.
onboarding.accountFootnote: Account optional · create or delete it at any time from your profile.
onboarding.sourceTitle: How did you hear about us?
onboarding.sourceSubtitle: One second to help us spread the word about Watchy.
onboarding.profileTitle: And when it comes to watches?
onboarding.profileSubtitle: Optional — to tailor Watchy to your level.
onboarding.cameraTitle: Identify your watches in an instant
onboarding.cameraSubtitle: Watchy uses the camera only to analyze your watches and fill in their details. No image is shared without your consent.

guarantees.photos: Photos and purchase prices stored for you alone.
guarantees.noResale: Your personal data is never sold.

onboardingNotifications.title: Stay in the loop
onboardingNotifications.subtitle: Get the occasional announcement that matters: new features, improvements. Nothing else — you can turn it off anytime in Settings.
onboardingNotifications.exampleBody: New: track your collection in English 🇬🇧

watchDetail.valuePending: Market value lookup in progress — check back a little later.
watchDetail.linkModelHint: Link this watch to a catalog model to track its market value.

market.chartEmpty:
Not enough history yet.
The market value grows with every update.
market.historySince: History since %{date} — it grows with every market update.
market.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated estimate, for information only — not an authenticity appraisal, a binding valuation, or investment advice.

watchEdit.title: Edit watch
watchEdit.requiredMessage: Brand and model cannot be empty.
watchEdit.invalidPriceMessage: The purchase price must be a positive number.
watchEdit.invalidYearMessage: The year must be between 1900 and %{maxYear}.

profileEdit.hint: Everything is optional. This information stays private and is deleted along with your account.
profileEdit.locationHint: City and country are enough — we never ask for a full address.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid or expired link — request a new reset email.

addWatch.fallbackSubtitle:
Search for it in the model catalog
or enter it manually.

profile.title: Profile
profile.guestSubtitle: Create an account to secure your data
profile.restoreNone: No subscription found for this account.
profile.deleteAccountMessage: Your account, collection, photos and wishlist will be permanently erased. This action is irreversible.
profile.priceAlertsSubtitle: Get notified when one of your watches moves ±5% in value

premiumGate.noSlotCollection: Your collection is full (%{limit} watches). Upgrade to Premium for unlimited, or add a slot.
premiumGate.noSlotWishlist: Your wishlist is full (%{limit} watches). Upgrade to Premium for unlimited, or add a slot.

purchases.offerUnavailable: Offer unavailable right now — please try again later.

errors.QUOTA_EXCEEDED: Slot limit reached for this list — upgrade to Premium for unlimited watches, or buy an extra slot.
errors.ALREADY_IN_WISHLIST: This watch is already in your wishlist.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests — please try again in a moment.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Invalid data — please check your input.
errors.GUEST_CREATE_FAILED: Could not create the guest account.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong — please try again.

onboardingLib.guestError: Could not create the guest account

oauth.notConfigured: This sign-in method is not configured on the server yet. Use email or continue without an account.
oauth.appleNoToken: Apple did not provide an identity token — please try again.
oauth.missingUrl: Missing OAuth URL — please try again.
oauth.missingCode: Missing OAuth code in the response.

documents.title: Papers & receipts
documents.subtitle: Photos of your papers, receipts and certificates — in this watch's vault.
documents.deleteMessage: The document will be permanently deleted.
documents.deleteHint: Long-press a document to delete it.

packs.pendingMessage: Your slot will be available in a few seconds.
